description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On January 21, 2025 at 5:57 PM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in San Francisco, California was in a 
collision involving a passenger car on Fillmore Street near Bush Street.  
 
The Waymo AV was parked at the curb on northbound Fillmore Street when a passenger car in front of the Waymo AV pulled forward and 
then began to reverse in an attempt to leave its parking spot. As the passenger car continued to reverse, the rear driver side of the passenger 
car made contact with the front of the stationary Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged in 
autonomous mode. Both vehicles sustained damage. 
Print
Clear Form
